compiled_state.title: Create ui-designer-payload.md payload contract with CACHE_MISSING, design_artifacts, and scope_split schema
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md defining the structured return payload that the dso:ui-designer agent emits. This contract is consumed by both the ui-designer agent (producer) and the preplanning orchestration skill (consumer, story 8163-83a4).

## Contract Structure Required
The file MUST follow check-contract-schemas.sh structural rules:
- Level-1 heading: '# Contract: ui-designer-payload'
- '## Purpose' section with non-empty content
- (No signal-contract rules apply — this is not a signal contract)

## Payload Schema to Define
The contract MUST define these fields:
- design_artifacts: object with keys: spatial_layout (path to JSON), wireframe_svg (path to SVG), token_overlay (path to MD), manifest (path to MD), brief (path to MD — Lite track only), design_uuid (string)
- cache_status: enum — CACHE_MISSING (cache absent or stale, actionable instructions provided), CACHE_VALID (cache present and fresh), CACHE_STALE (cache exists but stale — may still proceed with warning)
- scope_split_proposals: list of story objects (null when no split triggered); each with: title, description, rationale
- track: 'lite' or 'full'
- error: string (null on success; error message on failure)

## Acceptance Criteria
- File exists at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md
- Passes check-contract-schemas.sh structural validation (# Contract: heading, ## Purpose section)
- Contains all 5 payload fields listed above with clear descriptions
- Tests in tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-agent.sh pass for contract-related assertions

## testing_mode: RED
New behavior; tests written by red-test-writer first, then this file created to make them GREEN.

## Test file location
tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-agent.sh (follows tests/scripts/ convention for agent tests; see tests/scripts/test-approach-decision-maker-agent.sh as pattern)
